object "<$connector> Ethernet : NetworkConnector" as Ethernet #Wheat
object "<$virus> Stuxnet : Malware" as Stuxnet #LightBlue
object "<$monitor> ControlRoom : Monitor" as ControlRoom #Aquamarine
object "<$monitor> Diagnostics : Monitor" as Diagnostics #Aquamarine
object "<$monitor> DataAcquisition : Monitor" as DataAcquisition #Aquamarine
object "<$circuit> TurbineController : PLC" as TurbineController #LightBlue
object "<$circuit> SteamFlowController : PLC" as SteamFlowController #LightBlue
object "<$circuit> FeedwaterController : PLC" as FeedwaterController #LightBlue
object "<$circuit> ReactorController : PLC" as ReactorController #LightBlue
object "<$sensor> ReactorSensor : Sensor" as ReactorSensor #LightBlue
object "<$actuator> ReactorActuator : Actuator" as ReactorActuator #LightBlue
object "<$sensor> FeedwaterSensor : Sensor" as FeedwaterSensor #LightBlue
object "<$actuator> FeedwaterActuator : Actuator" as FeedwaterActuator #LightBlue
object "<$sensor> SteamFlowSensor : Sensor" as SteamFlowSensor #LightBlue
object "<$actuator> SteamFlowActuator : Actuator" as SteamFlowActuator #LightBlue
object "<$sensor> TurbineSensor : Sensor" as TurbineSensor #LightBlue
object "<$actuator> TurbineActuator : Actuator" as TurbineActuator #LightBlue
object "<$turbine> Turbine : IndustrialComponent" as Turbine #lavender
object "<$reactor> Reactor : IndustrialComponent" as Reactor #lavender
object "<$water> Pipe : IndustrialComponent" as Pipe #lavender
object "<$steam> SteamGenerator : IndustrialComponent" as SteamGenerator #lavender
Diagnostics -up-> Ethernet : Connector
ControlRoom -up-> Ethernet : Connector
DataAcquisition -up-> Ethernet : Connector
Ethernet --> ReactorController : PLCs
ReactorController -> ReactorActuator : ChildActuator
ReactorController -up-> Ethernet : Connector
ReactorActuator --> Reactor : ChildComponent
ReactorController -> ReactorSensor : ChildSensor
ReactorSensor -> ReactorController : ParentPLC
ReactorSensor --> Reactor : ChildComponent
Reactor -up-> ReactorSensor : ParentSensor
Ethernet --> ControlRoom : Monitors
Ethernet --> DataAcquisition : Monitors
Ethernet --> Diagnostics : Monitors
Diagnostics -> ControlRoom : SiblingMonitor
Diagnostics -> DataAcquisition : SiblingMonitor
DataAcquisition -> Diagnostics : SiblingMonitor
DataAcquisition -> ControlRoom : SiblingMonitor
ControlRoom -> Diagnostics : SiblingMonitor
ControlRoom -> DataAcquisition : SiblingMonitor
Ethernet --> TurbineController : PLCs
Ethernet --> SteamFlowController : PLCs
Ethernet --> FeedwaterController : PLCs
TurbineController -up-> Ethernet : Connector
SteamFlowController -up-> Ethernet : Connector
FeedwaterController -up-> Ethernet : Connector
TurbineController -> TurbineActuator : ChildActuator
FeedwaterController -> FeedwaterActuator : ChildActuator
SteamFlowController -> SteamFlowActuator : ChildActuator
SteamFlowController -> SteamFlowSensor : ChildSensor
TurbineController -> TurbineSensor : ChildSensor
FeedwaterController -> FeedwaterSensor : ChildSensor
FeedwaterActuator --> Pipe : ChildComponent
SteamFlowActuator --> SteamGenerator : ChildComponent
TurbineActuator --> Turbine : ChildComponent
TurbineSensor --> Turbine : ChildComponent
SteamFlowSensor --> SteamGenerator : ChildComponent
FeedwaterSensor --> Pipe : ChildComponent
FeedwaterSensor -> FeedwaterController : ParentPLC
SteamFlowSensor -> SteamFlowController : ParentPLC
TurbineSensor -> TurbineController : ParentPLC
Pipe -up-> FeedwaterSensor : ParentSensor
Turbine -up-> TurbineSensor : ParentSensor
SteamGenerator -up-> SteamFlowSensor : ParentSensor
Stuxnet -up-> ControlRoom : InfectedMonitors
@enduml
